notes: Validated the authored package built around the approved Qatar academic calendar with 30 August {{year}} for students, 23 August {{year}} for staff, and the 25 August {{year}} to 1 October {{year}} registration-transfer window.
The page already answers the family-facing query well by separating the student date from staff and service dates instead of flattening them into one late-August label.
Focused validation passed with validate-holiday-content, ESLint, typecheck, and seo:validate.
Generated holiday bundles were not regenerated because events:build was intentionally not run, so the rendered route can still lag behind the authored package.
